glass.summary: {name} refracts spellwork like a prism, but brittle forms make thunder and sonic force credible counters. Watch for weaknesses: {weaknesses}.

citations.title: Fixture Lore: Glass and Resonance
citations.snippet: Glass-aligned creatures excel at reflection and light tricks while suffering against vibration, thunder, and direct pressure.

thunder.summary: {name} carries storm pressure and heavy impact damage. Grounding, roots, and patient defensive play can blunt its charge. Watch for weaknesses: {weaknesses}.

citations.title: Fixture Lore: Storm Constructs
citations.snippet: Thunder creatures hit hard and disrupt magic, but grounded natural elements can drain their charge.

moss.summary: {name} wins by attrition, roots, and regeneration. Clean cuts, fire, and reflective magic keep its growth in check. Watch for weaknesses: {weaknesses}.

citations.title: Fixture Lore: Living Crypt Flora
citations.snippet: Moss and root creatures thrive in drawn-out fights but can be disrupted by heat, glassy reflection, and controlled arena spacing.

clockwork.summary: {name} controls timing with precision machinery. Water, rust, and invasive growth threaten its gears. Watch for weaknesses: {weaknesses}.

citations.title: Fixture Lore: Clockwork Beasts
citations.snippet: Clockwork creatures are predictable but efficient; moisture and tangling vines are common counters.

mirror.summary: {name} turns enemy force back through reflection and illusion. Thunder, shadow, and sunlight can distort the mirror field. Watch for weaknesses: {weaknesses}.

citations.title: Fixture Lore: Reflective Abyssals
citations.snippet: Mirror creatures punish direct aggression, but overloaded light, thunder cracks, or shadow interference can break their copying rhythm.

default.summary: {name} has enough mythic texture for the arena, with counters derived from its stated weaknesses: {weaknesses}.

citations.title: Fixture Lore: Arena Weakness Rules
citations.snippet: When live grounding is unavailable, the coliseum uses declared creature weaknesses and element matchups as fixture lore.
